rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Cobalt Strike UAC Bypass Using SQL Server Client Configuration Utility (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Cobalt Strike UAC Bypass Using SQL Server Client Configuration Utility (RedCanary
  Threat Detection Report)
id: 405ec76f-7d77-464d-b28b-4f5d9131346b
status: experimental
description: Detects a possible Cobalt Strike UAC bypass attempt using cliconfg.exe,
  the SQL Server Client Configuration Utility. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection
  Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/cobalt-strike/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.s0154
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \rundll32.exe
    Image|endswith: \cliconfg.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
